series_metadata.series_description: To comply with the Ohio Revised Code 3937.41(D) prohibiting unfavorable treatment of law enforcement officers by automobile insurance companies as the result of traffic crashes occurring while on official duty and operating a division-owned or leased vehicle (HP-3C).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until the affected officer''s driving record has been updated with an "L1" indicator. Destroy after verification or one calendar year.. ; Electronic: Retain until the affected officer''s driving record has been updated with an "L1" indicator. Destroy after verification or one calendar year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
